== Notes for [[Item:Q115477|Q115477]] ==

Wikipédia [http://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Soeiro_Viegas_Coelho PT]
--------------------
NFP - TTº Coelhos §1 N11; Vasconcelos §1 N9


-------

Not known father of https://www.geni.com/people/Jose-Olimpio-Coelho/6000000010985979246
Historical profile user ADMN tree (area added in 2010, dezombified in 2023)

---------

first to use the name coelho -pg 65 Nobliario


first to use the name coelho -pg 65 Nobliario

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
